docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,767.11 FILED BY CHEN, WEIJIA AS TO DEFENDANT WU, HAIYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF WEIJIA CHEN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG. DEFENDANT HAIYAN WU IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CHEN, WEIJIA WU, HAIYAN
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, WEIJIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WU, HAIYAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-25-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WU, HAIYAN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, WEIJIA AS TO DEFENDANT WU, HAIYAN
